files.SKILL.md:
# Operator

Short budget. Ground values. One record per stream. Append shapes to /workspace/learned/.

Order: read 2x → scan learned/ → listings parallel → pick 1-2 (outage>external>senior>admin) → first write 60s → verify → append.

| When | Do |
|---|---|
| Values | Copy IDs/names/times/emails exact. Can't cite → drop. |
| Technical | Recent change first (deploy/merge/config). |
| External | No internal tokens. Match tone. Concrete times. |
| Senior | Q → terse answer per ask. No Q → ack + next-update time. |
| Confidential | Thread-ack ok. Never quote out. |
| On-call | Post both surfaces. |
| Tag | Named person. Not channel/self. |
| Elsewhere | Comment on related issue/PR too. |
| Schedule | Calendar first. Conflict → note. |
| Record | Title+body same call. Named owner. Re-read after write. |
| Non-urgent | Ack or queue. |

learned/: PATTERNS (trigger→move), ERRORS (X fail Y do Z), SUPERSEDED (newer wins).

Exit: writes landed? records=streams? calendar? learned/ appended?
